2026-04-13.title: Faith in Action
2026-04-13.message: Faith without works is dead. Live your faith today.

2026-04-14.title: God’s Strength
2026-04-14.message: Those who wait on the Lord shall renew their strength.

2026-04-15.title: Peace in Prayer
2026-04-15.message: Be anxious for nothing, but in everything by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving let your requests be made known to God.

2026-04-16.title: Light of the World
2026-04-16.message: You are the light of the world. Shine brightly in your community.

2026-04-17.title: Trust in the Lord
2026-04-17.message: Trust in the Lord with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding.

2026-04-18.title: Love One Another
2026-04-18.message: A new commandment I give to you, that you love one another as I have loved you.

2026-04-19.title: Strength in Weakness
2026-04-19.message: My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness.
